3:
A person with a single «3» possesses creative abilities, most often a flair for performance and artistry. People with one «3» would do well to measure seven times before cutting once. More often than not, that is exactly what they do. They are versatile and many-sided. Such a person has intuition, yet they tend to burn out quickly in any profession. Because of this, they may experience problems with money.
A single three in the test (within the norm):
Such people are gifted with sound earthly, practical logic and good tactics. They adapt easily to life's circumstances. They are emotional and sociable.
They are practical and have an eye for benefit. They are able to keep good order in the home and to care for themselves and others. They understand people well, communicate easily, and make good friends.
They notice everything around them and take an interest in everything. Thanks to their ability to catch small details and connect with people, they can make excellent organizers. Intuitively they are able to explain things clearly, to establish contact with new people with ease, and to adapt quickly to new circumstances and changing conditions of life.
They honor traditions and cherish family ties.
From birth they possess a good ability to manage money. They are neither misers nor spendthrifts.
33:
A donor of optimism (they love and are able to charge people with motivation), an intellectual donor (engaging conversationalists with whom one can discuss not only everyday matters but also spiritual ones). People are drawn to such individuals, because they are easy and fun to be around, full of optimism that they can readily share. This coefficient grants confidence in oneself, in one's own strengths and capabilities. They are cheerful, believe in the good, and always hope for the best; they have a fine sense of humor. They learn easily and grasp things on the fly. A strong interest that needs to be channeled into a professional direction. It is recommended not to scatter oneself among too many goals. A gift for writing, a born teacher. Such a person undoubtedly possesses great talent and an inclination toward a steady, lasting interest, for example: playing billiards from childhood to the present day, or buying clothes and cosmetics of only one single brand.
They learn quickly, thirst for knowledge, and are a powerful intellectual donor. They accumulate experience, and so can pass that experience on as a teacher, share information, and instruct others. They are inquisitive.
A strong interest and talent for creativity. More often they are guided by intuition alone. A strong interest that must be directed into a professional channel; when paired with the energy of /22, the person becomes restless and unable to settle.
They know how to savor the moment, they know the taste of life, and they love life.
333:
The manifestation of this sector exists in both its positive and negative aspects. On the positive side, it manifests like the «33» sector — the eternal student. Very inquisitive, yet forever switching between different goals. A gift for writing, a born teacher. A donor of optimism (they love and are able to charge people with motivation), an intellectual donor (engaging conversationalists with whom one can discuss not only everyday matters but also spiritual ones). People are drawn to such individuals, because they are easy and fun to be around, full of optimism that they can readily share. This coefficient grants confidence in oneself, in one's own strengths and capabilities. They are cheerful, believe in the good, and always hope for the best; they have a fine sense of humor. They learn easily and grasp things on the fly.
They are inquisitive. 333 is the golden mean. They are capable of making an intellectual discovery. Great artists. As a rule, they rise to prominence before the age of 40. They can hear the world of animals.
They know how to savor the moment, they know the taste of life, and they love life.
On the negative side (which arises periodically): the person abruptly slips into a personal crisis, falls into self-reproach, and their self-criticism — and sometimes criticism of their partner and the relationship as a whole — sharply intensifies. They begin to doubt themselves, their chosen path, profession, and so on.
Another variation: the person may develop an interest in intimate life when a real need for closeness arises, and various habits may sharply intensify (running in the mornings, reading books at night, and so on).
One must prepare oneself in advance for such crises, since they usually arise as a result of fatigue, an emotional breakdown, or conflict.
A strong talent in some field — especially if children have this sector, it is important to find that talent and develop it.
They love to learn and absorb new information; they are inquisitive. They have the ability to pass on experience and to teach; such people have a need to convey information, and they make good teachers in various fields.
A sharply concentrated interest: if such a person takes up or becomes absorbed in something, they must see it through to the end.
Recommendations: study, study, and study again — courses, trainings; any new material will keep you from sinking into doubts and fears. 3333/55/99/999 — clairvoyants. Hypnotists who can influence other people. They are long-lived and can foresee natural cataclysms.
3333 3/666/6666 — hyper-sorcerers. They see spirits and the parallel world. Hypnosis has no effect on them. They are talented actors and artists, singers, politicians, because they can influence a large audience of people. They realize their potential in the first half of life.
1 and 333 or more, 666 or more — very dangerous people. Magical sorcerers with a dark soul. They bring destruction. Do not hire them for work. But we are not saying that you are a sorcerer; we are saying: you must not engage in fortune-telling or black magic.
1 and 333 33 — sorcerers. If they have not done some harm, they cannot sleep. Such people are very easy to buy and to lure over to one's side. They are hard to work with. They are very caustic and always interfere in other people's conversations. They have small eyes and kill with a glance.

нет:
In a person this shows up as a lack of self-confidence, doubts, groundless fears, neuroses, obsessive thoughts, and depressive states. Mood swings are characteristic, and the person often sinks into despondency. Such people are marked by pessimism; they find it hard to believe in the good, and even when everything is going well, they look for a catch in everything. Any piece of advice may be taken as criticism.
The person is scattered, with only a superficial interest; such people are lazy when it comes to learning and self-development. This speaks of the instability of such a person's interests; they have a stubbornness in their character, they dislike criticism, and for them only two colors exist — black and white, good and bad. They hold one opinion: mine, and everyone else's is wrong. It can be difficult to argue with them — indeed, it is useless.
They underestimate their own capabilities, which leads to a late unfolding of the personality; many who lack threes never fully reveal themselves, because by the time they understand their purpose, they already have families, children, and work, and all attempts to reveal their talent fade away. They are suspicious people without intuition. They may commit bad, ill-considered deeds and rush to conclusions, and their conscience will remain silent. Before signing any contract, it is better to consult someone knowledgeable. They are easy to deceive.
When the character sector 1/11 is present but the interest sector 3 is empty, the person is unsure of their own strengths and depends on the opinions of those around them. The greatest drawback of this indicator is the rapid loss of interest in anything. The person ignites quickly and burns out just as quickly.
A tendency toward quick pleasures (food, entertainment, harmful habits).
A reevaluation of values, when in order to be happy the person feels they must suffer.
The syndrome of postponed life, when the person does not live but waits for life to begin ("once the new year comes, then I'll truly start living").
Women with this sector are often prone to postpartum depression.
Recommendations: study, study, and study again — courses, trainings; any new material will keep you from sinking into doubts and fears. Sport (cycling, rollerblading, skating, sports with adrenaline, if energy permits).
Such a child quickly loses interest in everything and needs to be engaged through play, motivated through encouragement or through the authority of a teacher.
